name: Boetie Boer: Inside The Mind Of A Monster
original_name: Boetie Boer: Inside The Mind Of A Monster
overview: As Nelson Mandela is released from 27 years in prison in 1990, Stewart 'Boetie Boer' Wilken starts his killing spree. Unlike most serial killers, he had more than one type of victim. He also claimed to engage in necrophilia and cannibalism.

trailers.title: SA's secret serial killer | Boetie Boer: Inside the Mind of a Monster | Coming to Showmax
